playbook.intent: A feature moves through 5 roles with a single living artifact (spec + design + test-plan + runbook). Each role inherits prior context and emits a delta. Handoffs blocked if Definition-of-Ready not met
playbook.scope: A feature moves through 5 roles with a single living artifact (spec + design + test-plan + runbook). Each role inherits prior context and emits a delta. Handoffs blocked if Definition-of-Ready not met

success-criteria.criterion: All 5 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: PM Handoff
stage.intent: Outcome doc, not a Jira link dump.

tasks.task: PM writes the problem, audience, success signal, non-goals
Architect reviews and signs off on the doc
Anything ambiguous goes back to PM until clear

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when architect signs the doc.

stage.name: Architect Handoff
stage.intent: Design doc the dev can build from.

tasks.task: Architect writes the design: API, data, components, tradeoffs
Dev reviews; flags anything they can't build
Address every blocking comment in writing

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when dev confirms they can build it as designed.

stage.name: Dev → QA Handoff

tasks.task: Dev hands QA the spec, AC, and test entry-points
QA writes the test plan from the AC
Dev unblocks anything that prevents the test plan

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when QA confirms test plan covers every AC.

stage.name: QA → DevOps Handoff

tasks.task: QA hands DevOps the deploy plan and the rollback drill
Rollback drill is run before any prod deploy

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when rollback drill ran clean.

stage.name: Close the Loop
stage.intent: Every role signed at every gate.

tasks.task: After launch, retro the handoff at each gate
Patch the playbook template with any gap found

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written updated handoff playbook.
